sections.paragraph:
Σωκράτης, ους, ὁ Socrates, a name freq. found; a Christian in Corinth, who made a copy of the MPol: 22:2. EpilMosq 5 gives his name as Ἰσοκράτης.—DELG s.v. σῶς.

freq. freq. = frequent(ly)

MPol MPol = Martyrdom of Polycarp; after II a.d.—List 1

EpilMosq EpilMosq = Epilogus Mosquensis—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 983
